description: The ConfirmationHandler component is used to handle confirming an action. (what the actions are is currently not documented)

fields.Label: The message of the Confirmation box
fields.Color: The color of the button before confirming is allowed.
fields.OriginalLabel: The original label of the conformation before allowing the user to continue.
fields.OriginalColor: The original color of the Confirmation before allowing the user to continue.
fields.RevertTime: The time to allow the user to click the button.
